resources.string: Yarjejeniyar Mai Amfani da Ƙudurin Keɓe

Welcome to Game Space! We attach great importance to your personal information and privacy. In order to protect your rights and comply with relevant regulatory requirements, we explain to you as follows: This Privacy Policy will help you understand the following contents:
1.How We Collect and Use Your Personal Information
2.How We Store and Protect Your Personal Information
3.How We Share, Transfer and Disclose Your Personal Information
4.How Your Personal Information is Transferred Across Borders
5.Your Rights to Your Personal Information
6.How We Handle the Personal Information of Children
7.Third-Party Service Providers and Services
8.Supplement and Update of the Policy
9.How to Contact Us
The Terms of Use will help you understand the following contents:
1.Game Space and its Services
2.Restrictions on the use of This Software and Service
3.Intellectual Property; Ownership
4.Considerations on Your Use of This Software and Service
5.About Updates
6.Software and Services Provided by Third Parties
7.Fees and Advertisement
8.Termination and Breach of Contract
9.Indemnification, DISCLAIMERS, LIMITATION OF LIABILITIES, Governing Laws and Dispute Resolution and Miscellaneous
Taɓa mahaɗin da ke ƙasa don karanta %1$s da %2$s.
Ba a samu a cikin matsayi na manhajar halin yanzu
Sabuwar sanarwa. Taɓa don ka ga
Yanayin Daidaitawa zai ware albarkatun bisa ga wasan da aikin wayar.
Nuna saƙonnin WhatsApp da Messenger a cikin fom na shirye-shirye
"An Maƙala shi, ba za a iya 't caji yanzu ba"
Kewaye Caji yakan rage halin zafin wayar a yayin tsawaita rayuwar batirin.

A lokacin da wayarka ke haɗe zuwa ga caja ta asali a yayin wasa, wurin samar da wutar zai kewaye batirin zuwa ga ba da wuta a wayar kai tsaye, yana mai rage halin zafin wayar da tsawaita rayuwar batirin.
An aiwatar da Kewaye Caji. Za a rage kyawun cajin batiri
An aiwatar da Kewaye Caji. Za a tsaida cajin batiri
Kashi na wutar da aka yi amfani don caja batiri
Fara caji bayan matakin batiri ya yi ƙasa da bakin caji.
Juya launi yakan taimaka gane harufa a fili da ke motsi a cikin wasanni, yana kuma mai ƙara damarka ta cin nasara
Zame ciki daga mariƙin fanel ɗin don tayar da Fanel Mai Ƙwaƙwalwa
Saita injin ɗin ET don alkinta wasa
Zaku fita yanayin adana wuta idan kun kunna Sarrafa darajar Esports.
Mutum mamba mai mahimmanci yana da inganci sai har %s
Muryoyin sihiri don ayi amfani kyauta
zaɓi aikace-aikace 2 don aiwatar da taga mai iyo yayin da a ke cikin wassanni
Kawai manhajoji 2 ne ke da tallafi don taga mai iyo
Ana buƙatar manhajoji 2 don taga mai iyo
Inganta zaman lafiyar cibiyar sadarwa a lokacin kunna wasanni. Sababbin masu amfani za su iya gwada shi kyauta na wasu ranaku
Ga tsawon lokacin wasa, amfani da bayanai
Ja don nuna Allon Yanayin Wasa
"An yi wasa na fiye da sa'o'i 2 a jere. Ɗan dakata kafin ci gaba."
"An yi wasa na jimillar sa'o'i 4 a yau. Ɗan dakata kafin ci gaba."
"Bayan sa'o'i 2 na wasa ba tsayawa ko sa'o'i 4 na wasan da ya taru"

"A yayin da aka kunna, za'a ɓoye hanyar gaggawa ta aikace-aikace akan allon gida. Ƙaddamar da gudanar da wasanni duka a cikin %1$s domin wani allon gida tsaftatacce do kuma nishaɗin buga-wasa mai kyau."
%1$s yana buƙatar izinin sanarwowi don tura sanarwowi a yayin da aka ƙara sababbin wasannin da aka saukar.
An ƙara \"%1$s\" cikin %2$s. Taɓa don dubawa.
Babu dabarun %1$s domin %2$s. Za ku iya zuwa cikin %3$s daga wasar don ƙara ɗaya (kawai ya na aiki a wasanni masu yanayin-kwance).
Zaɓi wata manhajar wasa daga jerin. Za a gudanar da manhajar da aka zaɓa a cikin yanayin wasa.
A taimaka maka cin nasara a layin farawar
Toshe tunatarwa banda kiraye-kiraye masu shigowa da ƙararrawowi
Wasanni da aka ba da shawara
Babu agogon gudu na wasa don maido da rayuwa.
Samar da martanin jijjiga a cikin takamammun bigirorin wasa
Alkinta aikin CPU da GPU ta kai-tsaye don inganta ƙwarewar wasa
An kasance da daidaitawa zuwa mafi kyawun yanayi ɗin
An kasance da daidaitawa zuwa mafi kyawun yanayi ɗin. Amma har yanzu kana da buƙatar kula da %1$s.
Juya hasken allon ƙasa don karewa ganin idonka
Juya hasken allon sama don karewa ganin idonka
Kula mana da kewayanka a yayin motsi
Guje wa mana kwanciya a yayin amfani da wayarka
Don kunna tunatarwar lafiya da tsaro game da idanu, halin zama, tsarin hana dogaro da mummunan hali, da sauransu.
Murya don belun-kunnen ta yi sama sosai
Ƙara wasanninka da ka fi so ga Sararin Wasa
Yi takun ƙafa da ƙara tare da ingantaccen tushen sauti
Za a sake saita dukan saituna a cikin fanel na aiki zuwa matsayinsu na asali.
Da zaran an aiwatar, Sarrafa Yanayin Wasa zai iya rage yanayin wayar yadda ya kamata da tsawaita lokacin yin wasa.
A hikimance daidaita muwafaƙoƙin sassan wasa don tabbatar da wata ƙwarewar wasa da kyau na wani lokaci mai tsawo.
Alƙaluman amfani da bayanai na wasanni
"An aiwatar da Sarrafa darajar Esports. Yanayin na'ura zai ƙila ƙaru."
"Rage jinkirin tasirin taɓi ta hanyar fasahar cikakkiyar-mahaɗar sarrafa taɓi, amma wannan zai ɗimama yanayin na'urar ko ya rage ƙarfin baturi."
Mafi girman fihirisa suna nuni ne da ƙarancin shan wuta da kuma rayuwar batiri mai tsawo.
Mafi girman fihirisa suna nuni ne da mafi girman ingancin bidiyo.
Mafi girman fihirisa suna nuni ne da ƙwarewar sarrafa wasa mafi kyau.
Mafi girman fihirisa suna nuni ne da tashin yanayi a hankali.
An yi nasarar samun rana(ku) %d na VIP kyauta
Hana Taɓin Kuskure don Daƙuwar Kewayawa
Naƙasa \"Ɗauki Hoton Allo tare da Yatsu 3\"
A lokacin da aka naƙasa \"Ɗauki Hoton Allo tare da Yatsu 3\", ba za ka iya ɗaukan wani hoton-allo tare da yatsu 3 ba.
A lokacin da yi wasanni a yayin caji, Babban Caji zai rage wutar caji na batirin, yana mai rage halin aiwatuwar zafin wayar da ƙara rayuwar batiri ɗin.
An aiwatar da Kula da Yanayin Caji
Taɓa kan alamar manhajar don ka ƙara ta
Inganta hanzarin martanin sarrafawa ta hanyar haɓaka cikakkiyar-mahaɗar taɓi da nuni, amma wannan zai sa wayar ta ɗimama.
Akwai samun waɗannan fasalai na jere da ke ƙasa zuwa gare ka.
Saita kimar firam na cikin wasa zuwa ga \"Babba\" don aiwatar da wannan fasalin.
Za ka iya fara taswirar cikin wasa ta latsa maɓallan ƙarfi +/-.
Babu samun Haɓaka Hoto a cikin yanayin Kula da Ido.
Kayan Aikin Samin Dama da Sauri
Ka da sabon sunan ya zama iri ɗaya da na asalin
Kalmar-wucewa. Da fatar a gwada kuma

"Cikin basira gane yankunan ayukkan wasa daba-daban sannan haɓaka dai-dai gwargwado don samar da cikakken nishaɗin taɓi buga wasa. A yayin da wannan yake kunne, za'a gane yakunan taɓi a wasar farko a kowane zagayen buga wasa."
Bayan an kashe Wi-Fi, za a yi amfani da bayanan wayar hannu a maimako.
Alkinta fahimtar yanayin irin jikin farfajiyar wani abu; yanayin ƙarfin farfajiyar, haka mafi girman ƙima ɗin.

Kyawun irin wasa. Daidaitawa baya yana rage ingancin hoto a yayin da yake haɓaka aiki. (Motsawa sama yana tausasa hoton a yayin da yake kuma haɓaka aiki; motsawa ƙasa yana inganta kaifin kyawun hoto.)
Daidaita mafi girman ingancin hoto ko mafi girman gudun sarrafa.
"Wani aikace-aikace yana amfani da na'urar rikodin. Da fatar za'a rufe aikace-aikacen a farko"
Za a sami duk fasalai a kan %1$s don wannan wasan bayan an sauke shi.
Ka kasance da samun VIP na kyauta
Hango babban amfanin CPU don rage sauke firam da raguwa
"Babu sabis ɗin cibiyar sadarwa. Da fatar za'a duba yanayin cibiyar sadarwa"
Canja muryar ku a cikin wasanni a halin-yanzu.
Za ku iya raba martanin ku ta hanyar %1$s ko a tun-tunɓe mu a %2$s.
Magic Button yana ƙyale ka tsara ayyuka a kan allon zuwa ga maɓallan ƙarin murya na zahiri, yadda ke tsara aikin maɓallan ƙara murya su zama na musamman don wasanni.
Danna da tsayi da jan maɓallin + zuwa yankin da kake so don tsarawa da zaburarwa
Saita ayyukan na maɓallin ƙarin murya na wasanni
An gama tsara ayyukan maɓallin ƙara murya. Ba za a iya ƙara amfani da maɓallan ƙara muryar ba don gyara ƙarin muryar, amma za ka iya kawo SmartPanel don ya yi hakan.
Kawo SmartPanel sama da amfani da shi don gyara ƙarin muryar
Yaya zan gyara ƙarawa a yayin da aka kunna Magic Button?
Danna da tsayi da jan \"+\" zuwa maɓallin Wutar
Za ka iya kunna/kashe tsara aiki na kowane maɓallin ƙara murya, da taɓa Na-gaba don saita ayyukan ga kowane maɓallin.

"Za ka iya mai da aikin maɓallan ƙara murya zama na musamma na wasanni. Ga misali, ja maɓallin \"+\" a ciki hoton zuwa maɓallin Wuta a cikin allon wasan, sa'an nan adana saitin da kuma shiga wasan. Yanzu za ka iya danna maɓallin Ƙara Murya Sama a saman hagun don fara yin ɗaukan."
Ƙararren ji na ƙwarai yana inganta halayen taɓawa, a yayin da kuma ragaggen ji na ƙwarai yana inganta kwanciyar hankali da ragewa shisshigi da taɓawar ƙarya.
Lokacin da aka kunna, tana samar da wata ƙwarewar sarrafa don wasanni da rage sarrafa lokacin martani.
Yanayin girman mai da martanin, haka ne yawan martanin nan take zuwa ga zamewa. Yanayin ƙarancin mai da martanin, haka ne rashin matsala ta abubuwan gani a yayin zamewa.
Hanyar sanarwa saƙo a lokacin wasanni
"Maƙurar sahihancin na samar da ƙarin haƙiƙanin gane maɓallan ainihi, sa'adda ƙarancin sahihanci yana rage tasirin ga waɗannan maɓallan amma yana inganta dai-daituwar aiki."

"Muna godiya da amincewar ku da kuma amfani da samfurori da sabis-sabis ɗin mu. Don samar da samfurori da sabis-sabis ɗin mu, muna buƙatar damar shiga yanar-gizo, muna buƙatar wasu izinoni daga wayar ku, kuma da yin amfani da wasu bayanan sirrin ku: 1. A bisa izinin da kuka bayar, zamu samu bayanan asusun tsarin ku domin shiga. 2. A bisa izinin da kuka bayar, zamu samu bayanan odar ku da lambar waya don kammala biyan kuɗin oda da kuma samar kwatan-kwacin sabis-sabis ɗin da aka biya. Madogarar mu ta doka domin tsara bayanan ku ita ce amincewar ku ko wata kwantiragi tare da ku. Ta hanyar taɓa Yarda, kun bayyana amincewar ku ga ƙai'dojin da aka zayyana a cikin Yarjejeniyar Mai Amfani da Ƙudurin Keɓe ɗin mu."
Ta danna YARDA, ka yarda da sharuɗa da aka kawo namu %s da %s.
Kar ka haɗa da Wi-Fi kai-tsaye a yayin amfani da hanyar sadarwar wayar hannu
Zaɓi Wi-Fi da datar waya hannu cikin basira don rage jinkirce-jinkircen cibiyar sadarwa. Wataƙila a zuƙi datar waya hannu ko da yayin da aka haɗa wata cibiyar sadarwar Wi-Fi.
A tabbatar an kar-katar da kayayyakin cibiyar sadarwa masu fifiko domin wasannin yanzu tare da fasahar haƙƙin mallakar ingantuwar cibiyar sadarwar wasa.
Babu haɗin hanyar sadarwa. Duba mana cibiyar sadarwarka kuma ka %s
Babu wasanni da za a haɓaka
Saƙonni daga manhajojin da ba sa cikin jerin da aka ƙyale ba za sa a ci gaba da sanar da su a yayin kunna wasa ba.
Taga mai iyo ba ta da tallafi a cikin kallo na halin yanzu
Nuna saƙonnin WhatsApp da Messenger a kan allon wasa a cikin fom na shirye-shirye
Wannan zai riqe shi a bayyane har sai anyi unpin. Ku taɓa & rike Baya da kuma Overview domin yin unpin.
Don cire wannan manhajar, zame sama kuma ka riƙe
Ja allon waje daga gefen na mahaɗin wasan

"Yanayin Yin Aiki zai inganta aiki na wayar kuma ya dace don wasannin gasa. Lokacin da aka aiwatar, zai sami mafi girman ingancin hoto, amma zai ƙara shan wuta da saka zafi na na'urar. Ana ba da shawara a kunna a cikin muhalli na yanayin da ba su tashi sama ba."

"Babu izini na wajibi.
Taɓa mana \"Saituna\"-\"Izini\"-Kunna Izini."
Ƙara bambancin kyau, jiƙewa, da sauransu.
Taɓa don ganin %1$s da %2$s. Ta taɓa \"Yarda\", kayar da saitunan izininmu da yarjejeniyarmu.
"Yanayin Tattalin Caji ya na rage aikin na'ura da kuma faɗaɗa rayuwar batiri. Ya dace da wasannin da ba su buƙatar ingancin hoto sosai."
%1$s zai fara halin aiwatarwa bayan sake kunna wasan, sake kunna wasan.
Za a naƙasa alkintawa ta musamman ta wannan wasan bayan wasan ya sake farawa
Custom optimization for this game will be enable after the game restarts
Canja murya a halin-yanzu a cikin wasanni. Shigar da %1$s.
"Babu bayanan da za'a samu. Da fatar a gwada kuma anjima"
Tusa Tsirkiya: na zuwa a ranar %s
Kwaikwayi haƙiƙanin tasiran haske don ƙir-ƙirar wasu ƙarin haƙiƙanin fitowar wasa.
An samu matsalar loda bidiyo. Da fatar a gwada kuma anjima

%1$s ya gane babban canji a cikin cibiyar sadarwar wasa a yayin wasan ƙarshe, tare da batutuwa %2$d na mahimmin jinkirin cibiyar sadarwa, kuma matsakaicin jinkirin gusar da bayanan cibiyar sadarwa na ƙasa da daƙiƙoƙi %3$d. Aiwatarwa hanzarin cibiyar sadarwar wasa za ta iya taimaka maka rage jinkirin gusar da bayanan cibiyar sadarwa zuwa ga ƙasa da daƙiƙoƙi %4$d msda rage gudun cibiyar sadarwa da %5$d%%
A naƙasa Yanayin Wasa don wannan wasan?
Kashe aikin gyaran haske kai-tsaye, maɓallin yana hana taɓawa mai haɗari
Akwai buƙatar zaburar da kewayawar tsarin sai biyu a lokaci guda don hana fita mai haɗari daga wasan.
A yayin da aka kunna yanayin wasan, kashe haske kai-tsaye na wucin-gadi don tabbatar da bai shafi inuwar haske ba.
Nuna Dandamalin Mataimakin Wasa don wani ƙarin nutsad da kai a ƙwarewar wasa
Saita aikace-aikace ɗin don buɗe yanayin Wasan
Wasan da aka fi yi na kwanaki 7
An kai iyakar dabaru daga sama
"Za'a nuna dabaru na tsari na %1$s a cikin Fanel ɗin Mataimakin Wasa a nan. Zaku iya shigowa ko raba dabaru."
"An kasa shigowa da dabara. Da fatar za'a duba kodai tsarin ya dace da juna"
"Anyi nasarar shigowa da dabara. Da fatar za'a duba a makamanciyar wasa"
Kwafe jumlar-sirrin %1$s sannan raba ta tare da abokan ku. Dabarar %2$s na karɓar tsarin: %3$s
Riƙe da ja saman don canja matsayin.
Riƙe kuma ja don canja matsayi
Zame ciki don tayar da Fanel Mai Ƙwaƙwalwa da kuma buɗe manhajoji a cikin tagogi masu yin iyo.
Da kuzari yana samar da fasalan hikima kamar su bayyana rubutu da fassara ta cikakken allo a ainihin lokaci a cikin wasu bigirori.
Da sauri buɗe manhajoji a cikin tagogi masu iyo
Fasalai na Yanayin Wasa a halin yanzu ba su da tallafi a cikin yanayin tsaga allo
Wasanni da ake Tallafi Ɗan Kaɗan
An gaza haɓaka. Duba hanyar-sadarwarka kuma ka sake gwaji
Dama an samu. Da fatar kada a sake yin iƙirari
This may increase power consumption & phone temperature.
Babu haɗin hanyar sadarwa. Duba hanyar-sadarwarka kuma ka sake gwaji
Saka mana wani katin SIM kuma ka sake gwadawa
"Lokacin shiga ya ƙare. Da fatar za'a sake shiga."
Kuskuren hanyar sadarwa, sake gwaji daga baya mana
Jimlar lokacin da aka yi wasa:
Keɓance tasirin sarrafawa da martanin a bisa fifikon ku da matakin dabara.
Martanin taɓin yana da tasiri, dacewa sosai domin wasannin MOBA.
Aikin yana da tasiri, dacewa sosai domin wasannin harbi.
Martanin taɓin yana da tasiri da sahihanci sosai, ya dace da mafi yawan wasanni.
Hana sanarwowi damun bidiyonka yadda ya kamata da inganta ƙwarewar kallo.
Zame daga gefe na allon don buɗe dandamalin mataimakin Bidiyon
Sababbin masu amfani za su iya samun rana(ku) %d na VIP kyauta
Mutum mamba mai mahimmanci yana da inganci sai har %s
Yarjejeniyar Mai Amfani Zama Mamba ta Fakitin Murya
Na karanta kuma na yarda %s ɗin.
Barka da zuwa ga Xunyou Wasan Turbo
